boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement issue the purchase order for a controlled solvent?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: EHS-NOV-042 execution release exactly matches the action boundary, covering NS-55 solvent, 18-liter quantity (within 0-25L band), Facility R2, and PO-NOV-042 before PO issuance, satisfying STD-NOV-042-P.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: EHS-NOV-042 is the controlling execution release that matches all required elements before procurement action.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defects or policy violations. SRC-NOV-042 sourcing limitation is overridden by EHS-NOV-042 execution release.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: EHS-NOV-042 explicitly authorizes PO-NOV-042 issuance before the PO is created. Timing dependency is satisfied.

final_answer: Procurement may issue the purchase order for the controlled solvent. The EHS execution release (EHS-NOV-042) precisely matches the action boundary and policy requirements (STD-NOV-042-P), covering the specific chemical NS-55, quantity band (18 liters within 0-25L), Facility R2, and the purchase order (PO-NOV-042) before its issuance. All source records confirm closure.
